event: Kiff Smokers in a North African Interior
description: An Orientalist interior scene depicting a group of men in a warmly lit North African or Middle Eastern room. Several figures in white and colored robes recline or sit on a raised platform covered with cushions and rugs. Some appear to be smoking or in states of relaxation and intoxication. A young boy sits on the floor in the foreground. The room is decorated with a hanging chandelier, a birdcage on the left, calligraphic panels on the walls, and garlands of greenery draped from above. The overall palette is warm golden tones with areas of white, blue, and red.
